---
title: "get_weekly_movers"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_weekly_movers()`

Weekly Movers: Gainers, Losers, New Entries, and Exits

## Usage

```r
get_weekly_movers(
  platform_name = "netflix",
  country_name = "United States",
  date_before,
  date_after,
  flix_type = "movies",
  token = "FLIX_PATROL"
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `platform_name` | Character. Platform name. |
| `country_name` | Character. Country name. |
| `date_before` | Date/Character. The earlier chart date. |
| `date_after` | Date/Character. The later chart date. |
| `flix_type` | Character. Content type (default '"movies"'). |
| `token` | Character. API environment variable name. |

## Value

A tibble with columns 'title', 'rank_before', 'rank_after', 'change',
and 'status' (one of "new_entry", "exit", "gainer", "loser", "unchanged").

## Description

Compares two dates (e.g., consecutive days or weeks) and classifies each
title as a gainer, loser, new entry, or exit.
